name: codex-auto-orchestrator
description: Automatically plan, route, execute, review, and integrate Codex tasks across Sol, Terra, and Ultra reasoning modes.

interface.shortDescription: Automatically route complex tasks to the right Codex model.
interface.longDescription: Plans substantial tasks with Sol Max, selects direct, parallel, or native Ultra execution, monitors workers, validates results, and integrates the final outcome.
interface.defaultPrompt: 自动编排完成这个任务：
